description: ArtifactScopeFilterV1 prevents latest artifact side-channel reuse from bypassing MemoryScopeIsolationV1 / KnowledgeScopeIsolationV1.

scenarios.setup: newer run artifact belongs to target-a memory scope while current context targets target-b
older target-b artifact remains available after the blocked newer artifact is removed from latest selection
re_context pack embeds ArtifactScopeFilterV1 and indexes memory/artifact-scope-filter-report.json
